releaseNotes:
A new version for this app is revealed!

- Some UI improvements have been made.
- A new feature is being tried to be added: Widgets (It doesn't really work well right now.)
- A new feature is being tried to be added: Type Advantages for Game/DLC Teams (It doesn't really work well right now.)
- A new feature is added: Profile Card
- You can create your overall stats as a profile card and download this card as png.
- New missions have been added.
- You can now check if there is an update in settings screen.
